description: A hospital biomedical engineering department is auditing medical devices using GS1 Digital Link QR codes. Each device has a QR code containing a URL that points to its regulatory documentation (CE marking, IFU, recall status) on the manufacturer's web portal. During an audit, the technician scans each device's QR code and bcWebCam should automatically open the device documentation URL in the browser for immediate review — the auditor then checks the documentation against the physical device. Configure bcWebCam for this compliance audit workflow: enable automatic URL opening when a URL-bearing QR code is detected, disable acoustic confirmation beep (auditing in a hospital requires silence), set no terminating character (URL payloads must not have extra keystrokes appended), reduce window opacity to 70% so the browser is visible behind bcWebCam, and disable all linear barcode types (medical devices use QR, not 1D barcodes).
